query: TSMC Q2 2026 net profit revenue guidance capex raised full-year forecast Reuters July 2026

reasoning: Both sets contain the core correct facts (record Q2 net income, revenue, raised full-year revenue growth guidance to slightly above 40%, raised capex to $60-64B, $100B Arizona investment, Q3 guidance) primarily via the shared Yahoo Finance article and TSMC's own earnings release/PDF. However, Content A includes an actual Reuters article dated July 15, 2026, whose title and snippet directly address the raised forecast and $100B U.S. investment—directly matching the query's explicit 'Reuters July 2026' requirement. Content B, in contrast, includes only pre-earnings Reuters previews and a Facebook post citing the stale $52-56B capex figure, which could mislead an LLM into citing outdated capex numbers alongside the correct raised figures elsewhere, creating a contradiction. This makes Content A slightly more reliable and directly on-point for answering the specific query about Reuters' July 2026 coverage of the raised guidance.
